channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Wilier’s New Rapida Road Bike Makes Speed Accessible, In More Ways Than One - Outside Magazine
item.description:
1. Wilier’s New Rapida Road Bike Makes Speed Accessible, In More Ways Than One  Outside Magazine
  2. New Wilier Rapida majors on comfort and price – and I think it's one of the best-looking aero road bikes  BikeRadar
  3. New Wilier Rapida: total integration, aero design, and 36mm clearance starting from €2,899  Brujulabike.com
  4. Wilier’s new Rapida road bike comes with 36mm tyre clearance and sub-£3k price - Cycling News | Bike Reviews  Road.cc
  5. The New Wilier Rapida is Designed, and Priced, for All Riders  Bikerumor

item.title: How ‘Crimson Desert’ beat the critics and became a global hit - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. How ‘Crimson Desert’ beat the critics and became a global hit  The Washington Post
  2. Crimson Desert Dev Pearl Abyss Explains How It's Able to Update the Game at Such an Astonishing Rate  IGN
  3. ‘Crimson Desert’ Just Finished Its Three Month Roadmap In Three Weeks  Forbes
  4. Crimson Desert Widely Accepts Ideas From The Community, Rejecting Industry’s Fixation With Roadmaps and “Silicon Valley” Ego  Wccftech
  5. Re-blockades in Crimson Desert, explained  MSN

item.title: Apple Cuts More Mac Studio and Mac Mini RAM Options as Memory Shortage Worsens - MacRumors
item.description:
1. Apple Cuts More Mac Studio and Mac Mini RAM Options as Memory Shortage Worsens  MacRumors
  2. Apple quietly axes 128GB Mac Studio amid supply constraints and local AI frenzy — highest memory capacity reduced to 96GB, two months after discontinuation of 512GB model  Tom's Hardware
  3. Apple cuts more Mac options amid ongoing memory shortages  Macworld
  4. Apple Stops Selling Mac Mini With 256GB of Storage, Starting Price Rises to $799  MacRumors
  5. 'I've come to despise AI': Apple fans aren't pleased as more Mac mini and Mac Studio models are taken off sale  TechRadar

item.title: Red Dead Redemption 2 Officially Reveals Free In-Game Items Available May 5 - Comic Book Resources
item.description:
1. Red Dead Redemption 2 Officially Reveals Free In-Game Items Available May 5  Comic Book Resources
  2. Conserve Frontier Wildlife as a Naturalist in Red Dead Online  Rockstar Games
  3. Red Dead Online Event Month: Horse Event (May 5th-June 1st)  RockstarINTEL
  4. Red Dead Online Update Adds Naturalist Bonuses, Quadruple Rewards on Races, Discounts, And Much More  Worthplaying
  5. Red Dead Redemption Free Download Available Right Now  ScreenRant

item.title: All Of The Best Cosplay From Lvl Up Expo 2026 - Kotaku
item.description: All Of The Best Cosplay From Lvl Up Expo 2026  Kotaku

item.title: iPadOS 26.5 will add three new features for iPad, here’s what’s coming - 9to5Mac
item.description:
1. iPadOS 26.5 will add three new features for iPad, here’s what’s coming  9to5Mac
  2. iOS 26.5 arrives soon. Here are the new features to know.  Mashable
  3. iOS 26.5 to Introduce Encrypted RCS, Maps Changes, and New EU Features  TechRepublic
  4. iOS 26.5 makes Reminders app better by improving one of my top features  9to5Mac
  5. Encrypted RCS between Android and iPhone launching with iOS 26.5  9to5Google

item.title: TPCi's TCG Vending Machines Grow 27% in Second-Biggest Year, But 1 in 7 from Last Summer Are Gone - PokeBeach
item.description:
1. TPCi's TCG Vending Machines Grow 27% in Second-Biggest Year, But 1 in 7 from Last Summer Are Gone  PokeBeach
  2. Pokémon vending machines being pulled amid scalper drama, fights  Polygon.com
  3. Tokyo store makes you pass quiz to buy Pokémon cards as part of anti-scalper policy  Japan Today
  4. Pokemon Card Show Strikes Back at Scalpers with Long-Awaited Ban  comicbook.com
  5. 'We want every day to be a Pokémon day'  BBC
